name: Long/Thick Straight Up Smoothing Treatment
description:
Straight Up is the first natural hair smoothing treatment 
This package includes the 2.5 hour pampering session where you leave feeling great with smooth and silky hair and a take home hair mask to prolong your amazing results

name: Straight Up Smoothing for Teens
description: The perfect treatment for your Teen who needs to tame her mane

name: Short Hair Colour+ Foils & cut/blowdry
description: Root touch up, highlights, cut and blow-dry package

name: 1/4 Head Foils, cut and blowdry
description: Enhance your hair with a 1/4 head of foils, cut and blow-dry

name: 1/2 Head of Foils, cut & blowdry
description: Spice up is the perfect package that combines highlights, style cut and blowdry in one pampering session

name: Full Head of Foils Package
description: This package includes a full head of foils, style-cut & blow-dry

name: Long Hair Colour Package
description: Freshen up your look with regrowth or full colour, plus a cut and blowdry for women with long hair. Enjoy a complete service designed especially for long-haired clients.

name: Mid-Length Colour Package
description: Regrowth or full colour, cut and blowdry for mid length hair

name: Short Hair Colour Package
description: Regrowth or full colour cut and blowdry for short hair

name: Kids cut & blowdry bundle
description: Pamper your kids with a deep cleanse shampoo, relaxing head massage and condition paired with a haircut and blowdry

name: Coloured Hair Braids
description:
Crown Braid is a headband type style braid with coloured hair extensions added in

2 x braids is 2 dutch braids with added coloured hair extensions

name: 2 x Hair Braids with Coloured Extensions
Single Braid
description: Headband style braid or one directly down the centre of the head

name: Hot Towel Treatment Add On
description: Add a hot towel treatment to any service to relax, unwind and get the best results from a hair mask.

name: Infrared Sauna
description: Enjoy flexible wellness options with our casual, 5, or 10 visit passes. Choose the package that suits your lifestyle and experience soothing infrared sauna sessions whenever you need a relaxing escape.

name: Scalp Detox
description:
Refresh your scalp with a gentle treatment designed to remove everyday buildup and impurities. Enjoy a soothing experience that leaves your hair feeling cleaner and your scalp revitalised. Perfect for anyone seeking a clean, balanced foundation for healthier hair.
We use a scope camera to check your scalp for impurities and build up then after the specialized cleanse and blowdry, we re-scope to show you the amazing results afterwards

name: Complete Pamper Package
description:
Escape to a blissful retreat as you surrender to a luxurious hair and scalp revamp, unveiling magnificent shine, banishing frizz, and experiencing a rejuvenating transformation. Leave the world behind and revel in being pampered and reclaim your hair's youthful charm while soaring to new heights of beauty.

Included in this package is a scalp cleanse, deep conditioning treatment under heat or with hot towel, scalp massage and style so you can continue your Happy Hair Day :)

name: Kids Blow-dry
description:
Spoil your kids with a deep cleanse shampoo, condition & blow-dry

This is great to give your kids a deep wash to remove any scalp build up and pamper them with knot-.free smooth hair

name: Fringe Trim
description: Keep your fringe perfect and pop in for a quick trim

name: Superior Conditioning Treatment
description:
Enjoy a deep scalp cleanse & a superior conditioning masque under heat for deep hydration and long-lasting shine and smoothness.
Can be added to any hair treatment

name: Express Miracle Treatment
description:
Add a 1 minute miracle treatment & hot towel to any service and give your hair a new life :)
With the value of Moroccan clay, this treatment quickly binds to your hair creating the soft and silky hair you deserve in only 60 seconds

name: Straight Up Treatment
description:
Perfectly Straight Hair That Lasts
Instantly boost your confidence in just a few hours. Lose that unmanageable mop forever and wake up every morning feeling sexy and looking good with beautiful straight hair.

In just two hours and lasting for months, transform your hair with a market leading hair straightening treatment that's quick, easy and completely natural – using eco friendly, hair-protecting products for the very best results.

*Please book both Step 1 & 2. These are both completed at time of your appointment & are just split to allow for processing time.

name: Rinse-out Colour
description: If not having cut or blow-dry, please select the rinse-out options to allow time.
